objective: Add the top-skill 2.0 activation and operating procedure, connect it to self-governance manifests, and fix the run scaffold text-write bug found by the pilot.
contextSlices: Do not touch React Native or private TOP target rules.

stopCondition: Write one handoff artifact and stop.
